overview.short: Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple (Malayalam: കൊണ്ടാഴി തൃത്തംതളി ശിവ ക്ഷേത്രം; IAST: koṇṭāḻi tr̥ttaṁtaḷi śiva kṣētraṁ) a Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva situated on the banks of G
overview.description: Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple (Malayalam: കൊണ്ടാഴി തൃത്തംതളി ശിവ ക്ഷേത്രം; IAST: koṇṭāḻi tr̥ttaṁtaḷi śiva kṣētraṁ) a Hindu temple, dedicated to Shiva situated on the banks of Gayathripuzha, a tributary of Bharathappuzha, at Kondazhy of Thrissur District in Kerala state in India. The Kondazhy Temple is one of the important temples in Kingdom of Cochin. According to legends, sage Parashurama installed the idol of Lord Shiva at the south bank of river Nila. The temple is a part of the 108 famous Shiva temples in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kondazhy
topPlaces.description: Kondazhy is a Grama Panchayat & village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kaniyarkode
topPlaces.description: Kaniyarkode is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvilwamala
topPlaces.description: Thiruvilwamala is a hilly village in the northern region of Thrissur district, in the state of Kerala, southern India. It is located 47 kilometres northeast of district headquarters Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Vilwadrinatha Temple
topPlaces.description: The Vilwadrinatha Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvilwamala, a town in the city of Thrissur, Kerala, India. The principal deities are Rama, the seventh incarnation of the god Vishnu, and his brother, Lakshmana.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Ottapalam
topPlaces.description: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kerala is a school in Ottapalam, Kerala, India which offers education. Founded in 1986 with the support of Sri K. R. Narayanan, then member of parliament from Ottapalam.

topPlaces.name: Mayannur
topPlaces.description: Mayannur is a village in Thrissur District in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mankara
topPlaces.description: Mankara is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thrissur, locally known as JNV Mayannur, is a boarding, co-educational school in Thrissur district of Kerala state in India. Navodaya Vidyalayas are funded by the Indian Ministry of Human Resources Development and administered by Navodaya Vidyalaya Smiti, an autonomous body under the ministry.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (69 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kondazhy Tritham Tali Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kondazhy, Kaniyarkode, Thiruvilwamala, Vilwadrinatha Temple, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Ottapalam.
